ddls:
CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of temperature data collection */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the data */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum recorded temperature for the year */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum recorded temperature for the year */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average recorded temperature for the year */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data collection site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data collection site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the data collection site */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for data collection */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy or confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES temperature_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the organization */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Research specialization of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the source for verification */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_submission" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the temperature data submitted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who submitted the data */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who approved or rejected the submission */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submission_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES climate_researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submission_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES climate_researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submission_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Device information (e.g., browser, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES climate_researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for the report */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Whether the report is publicly accessible */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the report has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_reports_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES climate_researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the temperature data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the temperature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES temperature_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_sources_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the climate event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source of the event information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_events_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES temperature_sources ("source_id")
)
